name: Samantha ‘Sam’ Strong
description:
After the absolutely horrific murders of Martin, Cherry and Charlie, the once sleepy town of Woodbrook has grown paranoid and uncertain…But not matter how paranoid you may be, atleast you had one of your decent friends around to help!

Spoiler Warning: Obviously…If you haven’t read Beneath the Trees Where Nobody Sees, give it a shot! It’s a great read, anyway here is a Bear!

Warning: Mentions of murder and violence, nothing too serious but still!
creator: Antnamedpablo
